ideation: This animation sequence simulates the gesture of someone pointing backward, indicating a return or going back.  The robot will use its right arm to point, while the left arm remains at the side for balance. The sequence will emphasize the backward pointing action, with slight adjustments in the arm and wrist positions to enhance the natural feel of the gesture. The robot lacks a true pointing finger, but we can approximate this by having the right arm extend backward, with the wrist rotated to imply a pointing direction. The left arm will remain relatively neutral to provide a contrast and maintain balance.

frames.beat: arms rest, right arm begins to swing back
right arm extends back, wrist spins to point
right arm fully extends, clearly indicating behind
right arm holds the backward point, steady and then retracts slightly
